# pheno-worklog-schema

> WORKLOG.md parser/emitter for the ADR-015 schema (v2.0 + v2.1). Pure-Python, zero deps.

## Spec

- [SPEC.md](./SPEC.md) — single-page spec.

## Install

```bash
pip install pheno-worklog-schema
```

## API

- `Row` — dataclass: 11 fields (v2.1 schema).
- `parse(text) -> list[Row]` — handles both v2.0 (6 col) and v2.1 (11 col).
- `to_markdown(rows) -> str` — canonical v2.1 Markdown.
- `to_jsonl(rows) -> str` — JSONL for tooling.
- `migrate_v20_to_v21(row_v20) -> Row` — v2.0 → v2.1.

## CLI

```bash
python -m pheno_worklog_schema validate WORKLOG.md
python -m pheno_worklog_schema migrate WORKLOG.md --out v2.1.md
```

## Governance

- Substrate: `pheno-*-lib`.
- ADR-015 + ADR-025 + ADR-030 — see [docs/governance.md](./docs/governance.md).
- Worklog: [WORKLOG.md](./WORKLOG.md).
